D
Your leasing team

Dom Claudio

LEASING CONSULTANT · THE VILLAGE
"Looking for an apartment shouldn't feel like a slog. I look for the moment things click — and make it easier to find."

Good to know

What's the application process?
Apply online in about 15 minutes. We review within one business day and reach out either way.
Are pets welcome?
Yes — upon approval, up to 2 pets per home. 49 lb weight limit, breed restrictions apply. $500 deposit and $50/mo pet rent per pet.
What's included in rent?
Access to both pools and spas, picnic and play areas, on-site maintenance, and high-speed internet readiness. Utilities are separate.
Income requirements?
We look for combined household income at roughly 2.5× rent. Co-signers welcome where needed.
Garage availability?
Individual 2-car garages are available with select homes. Ask about garaged plans during your tour.
What's new in v4
  • Real Yardi data — pricing and availability matched from Reba's pricing run
  • Correct bath counts: Plans A and B are 1.5 BA (full tub plus master stand-in shower), all others 2 BA
  • Plan B+ renamed from "Renovated" — it's its own layout with 2 baths from the start, not an upgrade tier
  • AFF units hidden — affordable / moderate income units stay off the prospect-facing feed
  • "14 available now" headline number anchors value before scroll
Live availability mapping

  • Real brand palette — olive-brown, sage green, ivory cream
  • Whirlpool appliances · 2-car garages · W/D in every home · master walk-ins

  • 23700 Valle Del Oro · Newhall · Mon–Sun 9am–6pm · 661-475-8865
Why it beats the website
  • Push notifications when a plan you've saved opens up
  • Persistent saves and tour history across visits
  • Self-guided and FaceTime tour booking native to the phone
  • A real face to talk to — not a generic contact form
  • Mobile-native pacing for traffic that's already on phones
Next steps for a real pilot
  • Pull actual sqft and pricing from Yardi/RentCafe API to replace placeholders
  • Wire "Apply Now" to the existing SecureCafe link
  • Replace Dom's avatar with a real photo and finalize the bio
  • Drop in interior photography from the gallery page
  • Stand up at village.thevillageapartmenthomes.com on Cloudflare Pages

Floor plan sqft, pricing, and availability counts are placeholders. Real version pulls live from Yardi.

SCHEDULE A TOUR
Pick your format.
Tell us when works and we'll confirm your time slot. Most tours are confirmed within two hours during office hours.
Tour requested.
We'll confirm your time slot within two hours during office hours (Mon–Sun · 9 am to 6 pm). Keep an eye on your email and texts.
APPLY ONLINE
Ready to call it home?
Our online application takes about 15 minutes. We'll review within one business day and reach out either way.
  • Government-issued ID and basic income info ready
  • Pay $40 application fee per applicant 18+
  • Decision within one business day
  • Secure portal — your data stays encrypted
You'll be taken to our SecureCafe online-leasing portal in a new tab.
START A CONVERSATION
Talk to us.
Whatever you're wondering — pet policies, what's available, how the application works — drop a line and we'll respond fast.
Message sent.
Dom or another member of our leasing team will respond within two hours during office hours. Thanks for reaching out.
